body: scripts/e2e-fleet-monitoring.sh written (UC-14, 10 steps, 244c7d8). Creates 3 runs: pending (no state change), running (event append run_state_changed pendingâ†’running), completed (event append pendingâ†’completed). Verifies run states. Tests: GET /v1/fleet, GET /v1/runs/stalled, GET /v1/runs/escalated, GET /v1/status, GET /metrics (counts Prometheus lines), GET /v1/stats, POST /v1/runs/:id/diagnose, GET /v1/runs/:id/interventions, GET /v1/events/recent (verifies run IDs visible). Skips gracefully when endpoints return 404 for runs not in expected state.
